outputs.prompt: Explain virtual memory in two concise sentences.
outputs.text: Virtual memory is a system that allows a computer to use more memory than is physically available by using disk storage as an extension of RAM. It manages this by automatically swapping pages of data between the faster RAM and slower disk storage based on usage patterns.
